use_cases: Displaying SaaS subscription plans with tiered pricing
Highlighting premium features or badges on pricing cards
Showing value propositions for different product tiers
Comparing pricing plans side by side
Promoting special offers or limited-time pricing deals
ai_summary: A pricing card component featuring customizable feature badges with hover states and multiple variant options. Uses Tailwind CSS with class-variance-authority for flexible styling. Designed for SaaS, fintech, and e-commerce platforms to showcase subscription tiers or product pricing with clear visual hierarchy and call-to-action buttons.
